explanation: This command simulates a suspicious execution of InstallUtil.exe without logging by using an empty log file and disabling console logging. It includes the full path to InstallUtil.exe and uses standard command-line syntax.
This command uses quotes around the path and escape characters to simulate a bypass attempt. The /LogToConsole flag is written in lowercase to test case insensitivity in some implementations.
This command omits the value for /logfile by using two spaces, which may still be interpreted as an empty log file. It tests whether the parser treats whitespace as a valid empty value.
